## Description

Brief description of what this PR does and why.

Fixes #(issue number)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Code refactoring
- [ ] Test addition or update

## Changes Made

- Change 1
- Change 2
- Change 3

## Testing

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated and passing
- [ ] Widget tests added/updated and passing (if UI changes)
- [ ] Integration tests passing
- [ ] Tested on physical device: [device name]
- [ ] Tested offline functionality
- [ ] `flutter analyze` passes with no issues
- [ ] `dart format` applied

## Screenshots / Videos

If UI changes, include before/after screenshots or screen recordings.

## Offline Impact

How does this change affect offline functionality?

## Privacy Impact

Does this change affect user privacy or data collection? If so, how have you ensured NaviEU's privacy principles are maintained?

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
